data.title: Tax Collections Tick Up As Treasury Ledgers Elevate Cash Baance
data.description: Tax season 2025 saw a sharp increase in Treasury's cash balance, with $185 billion added on deadline day. This gives more flexibility to manage funding needs and reduce borrowing.

data.title: Novo Nordisk May Lag Behind Eli Lilly In Cardiometabolic Race, Analyst Downgrades Stock
data.description: Analyst downgrades Novo Nordisk, citing Eli Lilly's rising dominance and weak competitive outlook for 2025.

data.title: Hertz Stock Is Racing Higher Thursday: What's Driving The Action?
data.description: Hertz Global Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:HTZ) shares are ripping higher Thursday after rallying 56% on Wednesday following reports that Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital Management built a sizable stake in the rental car company.
